name: TildaZ Drop-down
description: Drop-down (quake) placement + global hotkey for the TildaZ terminal on GNOME. mutter does not implement wlr-layer-shell and Wayland forbids client-side window positioning, so the placement/raise/hotkey must run inside GNOME Shell (this extension). Reads ~/.config/tildaz/config.json as the single source of truth.
